'''Frossk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] who worked for [[Longo Two-Guns]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] for being loyal to Longo. He was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] sometime before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].
